Package com.gpudb.protocol

Class CreateCredentialRequest.Type

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.gpudb.protocol.CreateCredentialRequest.Type
  • Enclosing class:
    CreateCredentialRequest
    public static final class CreateCredentialRequest.Type
extends Object
    A set of string constants for the CreateCredentialRequest parameter type.

    Type of the credential to be created.
